AI Automation Studio

Develop, deploy,
and evaluate AI
that scales growth.

Demodoc is the AI automation studio for agentic research and generative content. We help go-to-market teams at high-growth startups accelerate sales cycles by activating buying signals and publishing branded content on-demand.

develop → builddeploy → integrateevaluate → iterate
Explore agentic research → Book a consultation
// the deployment gap

AI alone is rarely attributed
to revenue.

Go-to-market teams at high-growth startups have access to state-of-the-art AI models — and they are rarely attributed to revenue generation. Meanwhile, deals stall, and content drifts off-brand. No one trusts the output, yet you're still expected to generate pipeline.

The bottleneck isn't the model. It's the absence of standards — the context to ground it, the determinism to trust it, and a repeatable way to build, deploy, and evaluate. Go-to-market teams need to convert market research into actionable insights and on-brand content.

// solutions

What we build.

◇

Agentic Research

High-signal intelligence on competitors, accounts, and in-market buyers — ranked, scored, and delivered daily with the false positives filtered out so your team acts only on what matters.

▤

Generative Content

On-brand content at a cadence manual teams can't match — measured for what actually converts — across web pages, launch announcements, case studies, blog and social posts, ad creative, and more.

⌬

AI Automation

Custom-developed generative and agentic AI integrated with any model, CRM, cloud, comms, or design tool in your stack.

// the loop

Develop. Deploy. Evaluate.

Apply the software development lifecycle to go-to-market strategy to generate demand and scale growth. Assert agency over your AI agents — so they're deterministic where it counts and evaluated at every step. The agents executing your campaigns shouldn't be a black box.

▸ develop Build agents and automations to augment your workflows and brand standards.
▸ deploy Integrate your existing stack — models, CRM, comms, workspace, and design tools.
▸ evaluate Sort high signals, neutralize false positives, and maintain tone of voice.
Start a project →
demodoc — agentic-research — /bin/research
demodoc@research:~$
Agentic Research

Synthesize,
analyze, and
activate context.

Agentic research turns noisy signals about customers, prospects, and competitors into actionable insights — ranked and scored so your team can address the most urgent engagements first without false positives (or negatives).

Request a research pilot →
// the problem

Research doesn't scale
by working harder.

There's no standard for operating generative and agentic AI within a go-to-market org — so research stays manual, shallow, or both. Teams can't capture high-signal insight about competitors and key accounts, or about the buyers and users they're trying to reach, without flooding the pipeline with senseless noise.

Meanwhile the corpus only grows — a constant stream of competitor moves, buyer signals, and account triggers to review — and it's never clear what to prioritize or how to act on it.

// capabilities

Six agents. One
intelligence layer.

01

Social Listening

Highlight what users are saying about alternative solutions — a continuous signal across product reviews, social posts, and community forums.

02

Competitive Intelligence

Stay ahead of competitor launches, pricing changes, partnership announcements, and more — distilled into a daily brief, not a flood of raw alerts.

03

Account Updates

Know the moment a key account turns in-market — hiring, funding, launches, M&A — each scored for buying intent so you reach out at the right time.

04

Sentiment Analysis

Discover how users feel about your brand — the praise and the criticism they're sharing — sorted positive to negative.

05

ICP & Persona Segmentation

Refine your ICP with evidence from your own customers — quantified firmographics, detailed personas, and the channels that convert.

06

Lookalike Audiences

Find the accounts and buyers that mirror your best customers — your next lead, pre-qualified.

// the outcome

The right message.
The right moment.

Activated context means reaching the right user or buyer, at the right company, at the right time, with the right message — to attract, engage, and acquire your next customer.

Generative Content

Customize content
with your brand's
tone of voice.

Generate content that's brand-compliant, technically precise, and indexed — then go from brief to published in a fraction of the time.

Automate your content →
// the problem

On-brand, precise,
ranked — take your pick.

Most teams must compromise between content that's brand-compliant but generic, technically precise but invisible to search, or fast but off-voice. Publish by hand and quality holds but cadence stalls; automate and cadence climbs but quality slips — and either way, you're guessing at what actually converts.

The content lifecycle — ideation, generation, editing, publication — remains slow and inconsistent. Demodoc normalizes your tone of voice across every format and channel, so quality and speed stop being a tradeoff.

// one voice, every surface

From positioning
to proof.

One standardized voice, grounded in product specs and customer interviews — applied across every format and channel.

⚑

Positioning and Messaging

True to product spec, sharp on competitive differentiation.

✦

Launch Announcements

Product launch and feature release announcements that are unmistakably on brand every time.

✎

Blog Posts

In-depth, accurate content for every stage of the funnel — generated automatically and improved with your feedback.

⌗

Social Media

Publish branded social posts across every channel and personalize engagements with your audiences.

⌕

SEO & AEO Web Pages

Search and answer engine-optimized pages that rank without sacrificing brand voice or technical accuracy.

✉

Email Campaigns

Lifecycle and outbound email that stays consistent from subject line to signature.

“

Customer Stories

Case studies and testimonials built from real customer interviews — technically accurate, results-driven, and privacy-safe by default.

▣

Multimodal Ad Creative

Copy and creative for digital ads, normalized to your brand system across formats.

Custom Builds

Custom AI,
built on
your stack.

We design and build bespoke agents and automations — equipped to browse, enrich, generate, and act — then wire them into the models, CRM, comms, and design tools your team already runs on — with deterministic guardrails, so the output is auditable, not a black box.

Scope a build →

Any model. Any

// what we build

Agents with tools.
Content on autopilot.

⌬

Agentic Research

Deploy agents on proprietary or open-source LLMs, equipped to browse the web and social media, enrich company and contact data, and push updates straight to Slack or email.

▤

Generative Content

Automate generation of on-brand content for web pages, email campaigns, social engagement, digital ads, and blog and social posts.

// lifecycle

Deployed like software.

A repeatable standard for shipping research agents and content pipelines — deterministic where it counts, evaluated against real outputs, and under your control. You direct the agents; you don't hand them the wheel.

▸ integrate Connect agents and automations to your models, data, and tools.
▸ evaluate Test against real outputs — measure signal, accuracy, and brand fit.
▸ iterate Refine the context you extract and the brand voice you generate until it's production grade.
Discuss your build →

About the Studio

Built by operators,
for operators.

Demodoc is an AI automation studio helping high-growth startups deploy agentic research and generative content that scales growth.

Anthony Walsh

Managing Director

Anthony has 10 years of experience scaling growth for AI infrastructure and applications — at Meta, Atlassian, and pre-IPO startups.

That's the throughline behind Demodoc: an operator who has built and shipped go-to-market systems at fast-moving companies, now applying that discipline to the AI deployment gap that teams can't cross alone.
